text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Japanese Derby fast approaching,
Agnes Tachyon is unusually diligent in her
training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During all this, Manhattan Cafe points out that
Agnes Tachyon's running is different from usual.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I approach her about this apparent change, but
she evades my inquiry.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With my uncertainties and doubts left
unanswered, we make our moves for the big stage
this coming summer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She decides to change her schedule from running
in the Japanese Derby to the NHK Mile C. due to
her increasing lack of motivation.
